title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLMs, embeddings, or tool-calling agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Clean open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps Ollama REST calls with fzf model picker and conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate code, docs, or commit messages using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; chat & embed with any model in two lines.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and reactive examples.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Next.js chatbot template that connects to Ollama via the JS client; deploy to Vercel in one click.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile recipes for CodeLlama, WizardCoder, Zephyr, SQLCoder, etc.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds “Ask Ollama” command to summarize or rewrite notes locally.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django package providing Ollama model management admin UI and REST endpoints.

title: ollama-ktor
summary: Kotlin Ktor client & server example showing streaming chat completions with Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team to use local models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET client for Ollama with IAsyncEnumerable streaming support.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model; slash commands & thread support.

title: ollama-llamafile
summary: Utility to convert Ollama Modelfiles into single portable llamafile executables.
